constraint-react.reason: The frontend depends on React 18 APIs

module-level.focus: Модульные тесты для core-логики board.ts, levels.ts, types.ts

Testing.mocking-policy: Предпочтительно использовать fakes и узкие стабы вместо широких monkey-patch.

Observability.branch-observability-policy: Для критических модулей (auth, game routes, useGame) — маркер на каждую поведенческую ветку.
Observability.redaction: Никогда не логировать secrets, credentials, BOT_TOKEN, JWT_SECRET.

AutonomyPolicy.replan-trigger: Missing dependency, contradictory contract, or unclear third-party surface.
AutonomyPolicy.checkpoint-requirement: Every completed step must emit assumptions, commands, evidence, and next action.

DeliveryShape.shape: Same-origin monolith with one SQLite database and one Telegram bot process.
